libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer/local loopback endpoints for coverage; no external service is required. Ensure nativeTest runtime args/system properties include -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true for the 5.0.1 native run. Avoid targeting OAuth2WebClient unless also deliberately adding the optional vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 scaffold only applies the Netty/JDK25 runtime properties when libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; testing 5.0.1 without extending that condition can reproduce the native-image run failure.
Optional OAuth2 APIs are present in the artifact but depend on optional Vert.x auth modules; core WebClient, session, cache, forms, multipart, JSON, and streaming coverage does not require them.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but 5.0.1 still pulls Netty 4.2.x and should keep the JDK 25 native-run unsafe-access properties already used for 5.0.0.
